subcodes.first_line: O heart devoted to the love of God! In these days two stations are manifest and two ranks are known and renowned: one [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای قلب متعلق بحب الهی در این ایام دو مقام مشهود و دو مرتبه معروف و مشهور یکی
subcodes.subjects: @empty learning; false spirituality, @love of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
